HotelDetails.Description:
Hotel Overview: Premier Inn Dubai International Airport sets a standard for sustainability and luxury offering environmentally friendly practices state-of-the-art facilities and prime proximity to major transit hubs. The hotels modern design combines sleek architecture with luxurious touches standing out as an eco-conscious choice in the bustling city of Dubai.

Accommodations: Premier Inn Dubai International Airport caters to a variety of travelers with its richly appointed rooms and suites. Guests can enjoy a comfortable stay in one of the 281 elegantly appointed guestrooms. Each room at Premier Inn Dubai International Airport exudes sophistication with premium bedding marble bathrooms and panoramic views of the city or gardens. Options range from Standard Rooms to expansive Family Rooms and Quiet Zone Rooms for business travelers. In-room amenities include free Wi-Fi flat-screen TVs minibars and exclusive toiletries. Select rooms also boast balconies offering splendid views.

Amenities: The hotel features a comprehensive suite of luxurious amenities including round-the-clock concierge service valet parking private cabana rentals at the rooftop pool a fully equipped business center for corporate needs and VIP services such as butler and limousine rentals.

Dining Options: Guests can indulge in diverse culinary experiences at Nuevo restaurant serving Middle Eastern cuisines alongside international flavors or enjoy casual drinks at the onsite bar. The Costa Coffee lounge offers coffee specialties throughout the day. Special dining experiences include rooftop dining setups available by request.

Nearby Location & Transportation: Directly opposite Terminal 3 of Dubai International Airport and just a short drive to the nearest train station.

Nearby Attractions:

  • Dubai Festival City Mall - A vibrant shopping and entertainment hub located just 2 miles away
  • Dubai Creek - An iconic saltwater creek offering cultural attractions approximately 5 miles from the hotel

Wellness And Activities: The wellness complex includes a 24/7 gymnasium featuring modern equipment along with a rooftop pool providing panoramic views. The spa area offers signature treatments like aromatherapy massages and hydrotherapy sessions designed to rejuvenate both mind and body. Daily yoga classes are available for wellness enthusiasts.

Policies & Check-In Instructions:

  • Check-in begins at 300 PM using streamlined contactless processes
  • Pets are not allowed
  • Cashless payment methods are promoted throughout

Summary: Premier Inn Dubai International Airport combines ultimate convenience with luxury tailored specifically towards business travelers as well as leisure seekers looking for an upscale experience near major transport hubs in Dubai.


License Number: 629660,

HotelDetails.Description:
Hotel Overview: Premier Inn Dubai Investments Park distinguishes itself with a commitment to eco-friendly practices contemporary architectural elegance and a strategic location that ensures convenience for both business and leisure travelers. The hotel is lauded for its sustainable initiatives and proximity to major commercial hubs.

Accommodations: Premier Inn Dubai Investments Park caters to a variety of travelers with its richly appointed rooms and suites. Guests can enjoy a comfortable stay in one of the 304 elegantly appointed guestrooms. The hotel offers a variety of luxurious accommodations ranging from Standard Rooms to spacious Family Suites. Each room is designed with premium bedding marble bathrooms and exclusive toiletries. Guests can enjoy modern in-room amenities including free Wi-Fi flat-screen TVs and minibars. Select rooms feature balconies offering views of the city or the serene garden.

Amenities: The Premier Inn boasts an array of top-tier amenities including concierge services valet parking private cabana rentals at the poolside a fully equipped business center and VIP services such as butler and limousine rentals to cater to all guest needs.

Dining Options: Guests can indulge in exquisite dining experiences at Nuevo Restaurant offering international cuisine through both buffet style and la carte options. The rooftop features exclusive dining under the stars with menus crafted by Michelin-starred chefs. The hotel also provides comprehensive breakfast options room service round-the-clock and unique gastronomic experiences like wine pairings.

Nearby Location & Transportation: The hotel is conveniently located just 15 kilometers from Al Maktoum International Airport with easy access to the nearest train station within 10 minutes drive. It serves as an ideal base for exploring Dubais vibrant landscape.

Nearby Attractions:

  • Ibn Battuta Mall - 6 km away offers diverse shopping experiences.
  • JBR Beach - 12 km away provides sun-soaked leisure activities.
  • Dubai Marina - 10 km away features scenic views and luxury dining options.

Wellness And Activities: The wellness facilities include a state-of-the-art spa offering signature treatments hydrotherapy yoga classes all set in a tranquil atmosphere designed for ultimate relaxation. A modern fitness center large outdoor swimming pool are also available for health-conscious guests.

Policies & Check-In Instructions:

  • A government-issued photo ID is required at check-in.
  • Credit or debit card must be presented upon arrival.
  • All special requests are subject to availability; additional charges may apply.
  • Major credit cards and cash payments are accepted.

Summary: Situated strategically near key transport hubs Premier Inn Dubai Investments Park excels in providing luxurious accommodations alongside exceptional services tailored for families business travelers or those seeking luxury escapes. Key highlights include state-of-the-art wellness facilities exquisite dining options eco-friendly practices ensuring it stands out as an exemplary choice among upscale hotels.


License Number: 582399,

Between April and October 2026, we will be bringing our next evolution style rooms to Premier Inn Dubai Investments Park. We will be working in our rooms during the day, and apologise for any inconvenience to your stay.
